Hardi is obsessed with chasing fallen kites, but he constantly runs into Josephine, a kite vendor who sees his hobby as a threat to her business. It’s a hilarious tug-of-war between a man chasing his passion and a woman protecting her livelihood.

programme.title: Sul33 Siap Nikah Lagi
programme.desc: Sule has become a widower, returns to his hometown and meets his former lover, Uci, who has been widowed. Sule wants to marry Uci, and Uci agrees as long as Sule can get the heart of her son, Asep.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Apa Harus Dipatuk Ayam Biar Dinotice
programme.desc: Just as they were about to get back together, Farah (Glenca Chysara) catches Doni (Qausar Harta Yudana) being intimate with another woman. Despite Doni’s pleas that it’s all a misunderstanding, Farah isn’t ready to forgive and forget. To prove his loyalty and seriousness, she gives him an ultimatum: he must take over the grueling task of managing her chicken farm.

programme.title: Bang Angkot Please Do Your Magic
programme.desc: Yuli is a beautiful female porter who refuses to be seen as weak or fragile. She takes pride in her physical strength and independence. However, Nazar keeps getting in her way, intentionally offering his help at every turn. Is he truly being kind, or is he just looking for a way to win the heart of the toughest girl at the market?

programme.title: Cewek Ke-33 Makin Bikin Jatuh Cinta
programme.desc: Aulia is fired again for fighting with the grandmother she cares for, which has happened 33 times. Despite Kiki's resentment, her manager still hires Aulia because of her friendship with Kiki since childhood. Aulia is then given one last chance to take care of Marco, a famous photographer recovering from an accident.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake. The only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink. We test fire multiple handguns underwater to see if you can actually penetrate a car windshield and save the victim.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman's noose three separate times by shooting and severing the rope that he hangs from. We recreate each scene and test the reality of these shots with the weapons that were used.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building. The only way to save himself is to shoot through the glass window and break through to safety. Using the same Beretta 92 handgun, we reconstruct the office glass and see if our host can break through.
